versions.installHtml:
helm upgrade --install cert-manager oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=cert-manager:1.18.2" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install k0rdent-istio oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=k0rdent-istio:0.4.0" \
  -n kcm-system
versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   cert-manager-1-18-2             true
# kcm-system   k0rdent-istio-0-4-0             true
versions.deployHtml:
Tested ClusterDeployment in AWS: 

apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: ClusterDeployment
metadata:
  name: k0rdent-istio-demo
  namespace: kcm-system
  labels:
    # Label to automatically enroll this cluster into the Istio mesh
    k0rdent.mirantis.com/istio-role: member
    # Optional label to deploy an Istio Gateway in this cluster for inter-cluster communication
    k0rdent.mirantis.com/istio-gateway: "true"
    # Optional label to assign this cluster to a specific mesh (clusters with the same mesh label value will be in the same mesh)
    k0rdent.mirantis.com/istio-mesh: demo-mesh
spec:
  template: aws-cluster-template
  credential: aws-credential
  config:
    clusterIdentity:
      name: aws-credential-identity
      namespace: kcm-system
    region: us-east-2
    controlPlaneNumber: 1
    controlPlane:
      instanceType: t3.large
    workersNumber: 3
    worker:
      instanceType: t3.medium
